Self-hosted.

Deploy Studio on virtual cloud, edge, or on-premises. Self-hosted deployments offer more advanced levels of customization and control. Your data stays within your walls.
children.className: js-slider-item relative p-6 md:p-10 text-text-primary flex flex-col justify-between lg:gap-32 border-border-primary border-r border-b last:border-b-0 lg:[&:nth-last-child(-n+3)]:border-b-0

children.text:
Mistral cloud.

Get started with Studio hosted on Mistral’s infrastructure and build your own applications and services with our APIs. Our servers are hosted in the EU.
children.className: js-slider-item relative p-6 md:p-10 text-text-primary flex flex-col justify-between lg:gap-32 border-border-primary border-r border-b last:border-b-0 lg:[&:nth-last-child(-n+3)]:border-b-0

children.text:
Cloud providers.

Access the power of Studio via your preferred cloud provider (Google Cloud, AWS, Azure, SAP, IBM, Snowflake, NVIDIA, Outscale) using your cloud credits.
